text:
Antigravity 2.0 和 Codex 长一个样😂
Google 舍得拉下脸抄一下 UI/UX 也不是坏事，这样不会像 Gemini UI 那样难用了

The Odyssey and the Iliad get so many movie treatments but the sequel, the Roman Aeneid, is entirely ignored.

Here is a teaser trailer from one prompt to Gemini Omni. The first pass made all the flags Danish(?) but Omni is capable of editing video, so I asked for their removal. https://t.co/TQ7uMHzunW

Google appears to have removed all thinking traces on the Gemini site. That includes even the minimal summaries they had before

This effectively makes the Gemini site unusable for any serious purpose. You can't figure out what it did or tell what is real & what is hallucination

Why do people hate AI. 

Here's a report by codex after analyzing 20,000 comments on anti-ai youtube videos

https://t.co/uCb2ZlvtwO https://t.co/3SYEZJ3Ci5

I got to "play" a world model in real life.

The @GoogleDeepMind folks set up a crazy demo for Genie.

You select glowing orbs to represent your scene and character. It loads the world in the model, and you navigate with joysticks like a video game 🕹️ https://t.co/j347XMTt0M

Gemini flash 3.5 昨晚发布，现已可用。
- 模型效果大幅超越 3.1 Pro，指标和 gpt 5.5 接近，比 gpt5.5 好的是 Agentic 和 多模态。
- 价格只要 gpt5.5 的三分之一，缓存价格只要六分之一。
- API 定价 $1.50 / $9.00 per 1M token(输入/输出)，缓存 输入 $0.15。上下文窗口 1M token。
- https://t.co/0q17f8pu1i

看 Google IO 的的感受是这样的：
前半段，Google 太强了，真的什么都做了，从模型到应用，牛逼
后半段，Google 太乱了，怎么什么都做三遍，功能都一样，累了
RT @icreatelife: You choose a character and an environment and Project Genie generates the world you can move inside and it’s generated in…
What matters most is what you do with all this technology
#google
Grok needs a conference too

A lot of AI creators share they struggle with impressions. Mine has been pretty good, because I observed one thing. 

You need to let your personal brand rest. 

What I need by that: we all support and tag a lot of AI tools, for a bit try to post only contributing posts, no

RT @alliekmiller: Front row for the Sundar session at Google IO 👀 

I spy with my Google eye (oh) some fellow creators: @minchoi @siliconva…
Super cool to see my buddy @MatthewBerman on stage with @sundarpichai at Google I/O. What a journey he’s been on lately! So amazing to see. https://t.co/VaGlCMZBfe

Google has hidden thinking traces on the Gemini site. You have to use the 3 dot menu to pull up summaries, which are so minimal as to be unusable. 

Did it do web searches? Did it check results? You can't tell. This makes Gemini unsuitable for any serious work you need correct. https://t.co/Qy84JiN0sW

(I originally wrote that Gemini removed thinking traces. People in the comments pointed out that they are accessible from a menu, so I did a new tweet. But I cannot believe how useless the thinking traces are. It makes Gemini outputs completely unauditable and thus untrustworthy)

I find this continually frustrating. Gemini 3.5 Flash is excellent, as is Gemini 3.1 Pro. But you absolutely cannot use them for any serious purpose right now, especially for any enterprise work. Compare to Claude or ChatGPT: you can understand what the model did & how to correct https://t.co/isIjokLmGW

The crazy thing is that Antigravity does this quite well! So it isn't like Google is hiding these thinking traces because of distillation or because they are full of insane mutterings.

I guess you need to either do the work in Antigravity or not at all? https://t.co/QE1uwIvjpO

Fascinatingly Antigravity is actually the best tool so far at providing this sort of transparency, doing something by default that Codex and Code do not: offering a summary of exactly what it did at the end of a task.

Just add this to Gemini! (But also cite sources more) https://t.co/aVo4XgKhUi

The gap between what you can do on ChatGPT/Codex and Claude/Code/Cowork is closing, as Anthropic & OpenAI converge on a single experience.

Google's experiences are diverging: Studio & Gemini & Antigravity & the other Google AI apps are increasingly different.

Which will win?
And the Great Powers have become aware of this thread. https://t.co/sQwQNAE5MD

For those saying "the tomato sauce blood from the sword wound that flying Shakespeare inflicted on the pizza robot while the otters discussed Spirit Airlines wasn't thick enough" or whatever...

this was state of the art in July 2025 (2 years) for "an otter using wifi on a plane" https://t.co/ky1f6nYHvV

RT @rileybrown: Codex and Claude Code are now being used for marketing and content creation. 

Here are 7 Skills / Plugins I use daily for…
RT @godofprompt: Opus 4.7 is ignoring project instructions, skipping MCP servers, and burning through usage limits on tasks Opus 4.6 handle…
https://t.co/qCQiSOmJ7N
So.. everybody’s joining Anthropic now? https://t.co/OsVih3Fck5

同事说现在 Codex 给的太多太多了，实在用不完
于是在 Cola 里加了个 Codex 登录功能
这样用户就可以直接用 Codex 套餐驱动 Cola 了
双厨狂喜
此外，Cola 现在也支持用户填写自己的 key 了
目前支持了 GPT 和 Claude https://t.co/F6wBgxgMLi

看看 Gemini Omni的实力

一句话就是：视频版的香蕉🍌

当然远不至于视频的编辑能力，它应该是世界模型的雏形...

通用AGI的初始形态... https://t.co/PJADzozspk

Omni 接通了 Gemini 的世界知识库

它可以做"蛋白质折叠"的黏土动画教程视频，或者"26 个字母对应 26 个奇怪物品"的节奏感的讲解视频 https://t.co/avYkYBqWtF
通过任意输入组合创作视频 https://t.co/gqRYZAs2Gg
能模拟真实的物理世界规律 https://t.co/6Y8jLHql60

Google I/O 2026 开发者大会

完整中英文双语视频

Google I/O 2026：Gemini 3.5 Flash、Spark、Omni 三剑齐发

Gemini 3.5 Flash升级为：行动大脑

Gemini Spark：远端个人 AIAgent 入口

Gemini Omni：多模态世界模型雏形 https://t.co/5c03ViwgFB

Google 智能眼镜 展示

让你"不用掏手机"就能完成日常的事情

让 Gemini 帮你 点咖啡，手机放兜里，眼镜只在最后一步确认时提示即可 https://t.co/RuF3Qx5BFT
